channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 16 Jun: Harare overcast · high 20° / low 8°
item.description: Harare: high 20°, low 8° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 22°, low 10° (clear sky) · Mutare: high 20°, low 9° (clear sky) · Gweru: high 21°, low 9° (clear sky) · Masvingo: high 23°, low 9° (partly cloudy) · Victoria Falls: high 25°, low 11° (overcast) Tsumo yezuva: Chaitemura chava kuseva. (The once great are now impoverished.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
